featureDetection.rationale: Performs support probing by setting attribute markup on a probe element and reading back to check if < > escaping is supported.

gracefulFallback.rationale: The playground works perfectly on any browser by illustrating both vulnerable and protected behaviors clearly.

genuineInteraction.rationale: Highly interactive environment enabling users to write custom strings, select input methods, select attack presets, and see full step-by-step XSS parsing outputs.

builderMultipleDemos.rationale: Very thorough and interactive playground clarifying the exact exploitation mechanics and the fix.

designSystemContrast.rationale: Strictly follows design system variables with high-contrast text highlight colors.

references.rationale: The page does not contain any reference link to chromestatus.com/feature/6264983847174144.

openQuestions.title: Add ChromeStatus reference link
openQuestions.detail: The concept page is missing the required chromestatus.com/feature/6264983847174144 reference link.
